overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from a covered arcade through urban streets and under elevated highways toward a plaza with massive holographic advertisements, including the Militech building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with red neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing by storefronts and seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench against the wall

entered.detail: overhead roof structure with red neon strip lighting running along the ceiling
bright red fluorescent tubes illuminating the walkway ceiling
green illuminated sign with Japanese characters indicating business is open
shop window with dark interior and reflective glass surface
large screen displaying cyan and blue graphics on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered pedestrian arcade illuminated by intense red neon ceiling lights. The player walks forward past a seated pedestrian on the right, with Japanese signage and glass storefronts visible along the walls. The enclosed space creates an intimate, cyberpunk atmosphere with artificial lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and holographic billboards

events.description: exits the covered arcade and turns left onto the open street, revealing the night sky and city buildings
crosses the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left out of the arcade and crossing the street amidst other pedestrians, then continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on, waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: large three-dimensional holographic advertisement of a woman in purple clothing projected on building facade
massive futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents towering above the street
broad yellow zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
elevated highway or monorail track structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the arcade into a bustling urban intersection, turning left to cross the street. The scene opens up to reveal towering cyberpunk skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic advertisements, including a prominent purple hologram of a woman. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles wait at the intersection, transitioning from the enclosed arcade to the open city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: enters the shadow of the elevated highway structure, significantly dimming the ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the massive overpass structure, passing pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants and jacket walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal overpass structure casting shadows over the sidewalk
concrete dividers with yellow paint separating the sidewalk from the street
tall building with dark exterior and vertical illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway overpass, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The player moves along a concrete sidewalk bordered by yellow barriers, with the heavy infrastructure looming overhead. Pedestrians walk in the same direction ahead, and the lighting shifts to a dimmer, shadowed atmosphere as the camera progresses under the urban canopy toward a more open area in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive holographic advertisements and corporate towers

events.description: massive holographic soda bottle advertisement with explosion effects becomes visible ahead
Militech corporate building with illuminated signage comes into full view on the left

agents.ego_description: walking toward the plaza while observing the massive holographic displays and futuristic cityscape

entered.detail: tall corporate skyscraper with 'MILITECH' signage illuminated at the top, featuring vertical light strips
enormous three-dimensional holographic advertisement of a soda bottle with dynamic spark and explosion effects
cyan-colored floating holographic sign with jellyfish-like shape displaying text
row of palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by massive holographic advertisements, including a spectacular soda bottle display with explosive visual effects. The Militech corporate tower rises prominently on the left, while palm trees line the avenue. The camera moves through this open, brightly lit area with mixed neon and ambient lighting, showcasing the grandeur of the cyberpunk cityscape with moderate vehicle traffic and scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic neon arcade into the sprawling, holographic grandeur of a futuristic city center. It begins within a narrow pedestrian arcade bathed in intense red ceiling lights and lined with Japanese signage, moving past a seated pedestrian toward the exit. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a bustling urban intersection where the lighting shifts to a vibrant mix of purple holograms and towering skyscrapers while crossing a yellow-striped street. The environment then becomes darker and more oppressive as the camera passes beneath the heavy concrete canopy of an elevated highway overpass, following other pedestrians along a shadowed sidewalk. Finally, the space expands into a wide, brightly lit plaza dominated by a massive soda bottle hologram and the imposing Militech corporate tower, with palm trees lining the avenue under a brilliant neon sky.
